content:
**Summary of the Finnish Ministry of Defence Press Release:**

On Sunday morning, several low-flying, slow-moving small objects were detected in Finnish airspace, primarily over sea areas and Southeast Finland. The Air Force deployed an F/A-18 Hornet fighter jet to identify the objects.

According to current information, one drone crashed north of Kouvola, and another east of Kouvola. Police have secured the crash sites for further investigation.

Defence Minister Antti Häkkänen stated that the drones had strayed into Finnish territory and emphasized that security authorities had responded immediately.

The Defence Forces, in collaboration with other authorities, are investigating the incident.
